Bash(powershell -Command "\(Get-Content 'dist\\meal-plan\\high-protein-low-calorie-meal-plan\\index.html'\) | Select-String -Pattern '<title>|<meta name=\\"description\\"|<meta property=\\"og:|<meta name=\\"twitter:' | Select-Object -First 10")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('dist/meal-plan/high-protein-low-calorie-meal-plan/index.html','utf8'\); const m=html.match\(/<title>[^<]+<\\/title>|<meta name=\\"description\\"[^>]+>|<meta property=\\"og:type\\"[^>]+>|<meta name=\\"twitter:card\\"[^>]+>/g\); console.log\(m?.join\('\\n'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const lines=fs.readFileSync\('src/data/mealPlans.js','utf8'\).split\('\\n'\); console.log\('Total lines:', lines.length\); console.log\('Last 30 lines:'\); console.log\(lines.slice\(-30\).join\('\\n'\)\);")
Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont; print\('pillow ok'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont; print\('pillow ok'\)")
Bash(py -3 -c "from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont; print\('pillow ok'\)")
Bash(py -3 -c "from PIL import Image; print\('pillow ok'\)")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem C:\\Windows\\Fonts | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "segoeui|arial|calibri|inter" } | Select-Object Name | Sort-Object Name)
Bash(py -3 -c "import os; fonts=[f for f in os.listdir\('C:/Windows/Fonts'\) if f.endswith\('.ttf'\)]; print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(fonts\)[:40]\)\)")
Bash(grep -o "No problems detected[^\\\\]*\\|check\(s\) need attention" a.html)
PowerShell(try { $p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop\).OwningProcess; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "Stopped server PID $p" } catch { "No server on port 3000" })
